title: Podcast SEO 2026: How to Optimize Your Show for Search Engines and Platforms
excerpt: Discover the latest podcast SEO strategies for 2026, including website optimization, transcript usage, and platform-specific tactics to increase discoverability.

content.text: Podcast discovery has shifted dramatically in 2026. YouTube now leads podcast discovery in the US, search engines index podcast metadata and episode pages, and platform algorithms rely on titles, descriptions, and engagement signals. This guide covers the latest SEO strategies to make your podcast discoverable across search engines and platforms.
The podcast landscape is more competitive than ever. Here's why SEO matters:

items: YouTube now leads podcast discovery in the US
Search engines index podcast metadata and episode pages
Platform algorithms (Spotify, Apple) rely on titles, descriptions, and engagement signals
Web browser listening is rising (7.3% of total listens)
Episode pages with transcripts rank in Google and AI search results

content.text: Basic principles of optimizing podcast content for search engines:

items: Your website is where podcast SEO happens (episode pages, transcripts, schema markup)
Every episode should function like a search landing page
Transcripts are the biggest SEO multiplier for podcasts
Topical clusters outperform isolated episode pages
Podcast SEO should drive business outcomes, not just listens

content.text: Actionable steps for optimizing each episode:

items: Keyword research: Identify niche-specific keywords using Ahrefs/SEMrush
Title optimization: Create compelling, keyword-rich episode titles
Description optimization: Write engaging descriptions with target keywords
Show notes: Include detailed show notes with timestamps and links
Transcripts: Provide clean, readable transcripts for each episode
Schema markup: Implement podcast schema (JSON-LD) for episode pages
Internal linking: Link related episodes and pillar content
Platform optimization: Optimize for Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube

content.text: Detailed optimization tactics for major podcast platforms:

items: Spotify: Optimize for Spotify's algorithmic playlists and search
Apple Podcasts: Use categories, keywords, and episode artwork effectively
YouTube: Create video versions of podcasts with SEO-optimized titles and descriptions
Google Podcasts: Ensure proper indexing via Google Search Console

content.text: Key metrics and tools for tracking podcast SEO performance:

items: Organic traffic to episode pages
Keyword rankings for target terms
Platform-specific metrics (listens, follows, shares)
Backlinks to episode pages
Conversion rates (email signups, demo requests)

content.text: Pitfalls that can hinder podcast SEO:

items: Neglecting website optimization for podcast episodes
Skipping transcripts or using poor-quality auto-generated ones
Focusing only on platform algorithms and ignoring website SEO
Not tracking performance with analytics tools
Overlooking internal linking opportunities
Keyword research: Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Keyword Planner
Transcription services: Rev, Otter.ai, Descript
SEO analysis: Google Search Console, Google Analytics
Schema markup generators: Merkle, Schema.org
Podcast hosting: Buzzsprout, Libsyn, Anchor
